title: Aureline emergency metadata chain-entry contract
description: Boundary schema for metadata_chain_entry_record, the export-safe chain-of-custody row that links imported emergency metadata (revocations, channel freezes, emergency disables, and related advisory metadata) to the local mirror / offline / air-gapped state it changed. Entries are designed to be carried inside support packets, admin exports, and release-room/shiproom evidence bundles so reviewers can reconstruct when emergency state arrived, which receipt proved the import, which signer-continuity and trust-root posture governed acceptance, and which target scope the import applied to, without relying on operator memory or volatile local logs. Raw bundle bytes, raw signatures, raw trust-root key material, raw absolute paths, raw operator identifiers, raw device identifiers, and raw private endpoints never cross this boundary; the record carries controlled vocabulary, digests, timestamps, and opaque refs only.

metadata_chain_entry_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this metadata-chain entry export.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to export. Raw bytes and raw private identifiers never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_sentence.description: Short, reviewable sentence. Raw secret material and raw payload bytes MUST NOT appear.

propagation_kind_class.description: Closed kind vocabulary naming which emergency-metadata family this chain entry describes.

chain_id.description: Stable chain id shared with manual_import_receipt_record.metadata_chain.chain_id so chain entries and receipts join mechanically.

authoritative_origin_ref.description: Opaque ref to the authoritative emergency_action_record / revocation_record / advisory_record / emergency_disable_bundle_record this import ultimately roots in.

manual_import_receipt_ref.description: Opaque ref to the manual_import_receipt_record that proved this import on this target.

artifact_family_refs.description: Opaque refs into artifacts/release/artifact_family_map.yaml naming the artifact families this entry governs on the receiving target.

subject_refs.description: Typed subject refs mirrored from the imported record.

trust_root_rotation_state_refs.description: Opaque refs into schemas/release/trust_root_rotation_state.schema.json required for trust-root imports and admitted for all other metadata kinds when trust-root posture gated acceptance.

allOf.description: A chain entry that references a trust-root scoped receipt must carry at least one trust_root_rotation_state_ref so trust-root posture remains inspectable in offline exports.
Metadata chain entries never claim authoritative_live freshness; live freshness is reserved for authoritative origin distribution rows.

metadata_chain_entry_record.description: One metadata-chain entry row for an imported emergency metadata change on a specific target scope.
